title: NHA Concludes Chintan Shivir on Digital Health
summary: The National Health Authority concluded a two-day Chintan Shivir in Pune focusing on AB PM-JAY and ABDM. The event highlighted innovation and cooperative governance, showcasing Karnataka's online referral system and Gujarat's clinical governance mechanisms. The initiative aims to strengthen healthcare delivery through data-driven decision-making and digital verification, ensuring improved clinical appropriateness and cost efficiencies across various Indian States and UTs.

title: MoHFW Launches Clinical Workflow App for CHOs
summary: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare launched an ICMR-developed mobile application to streamline clinical workflows for Community Health Officers at Sub-Centre Ayushman Arogya Mandirs. Aligned with 12 CPHC service packages, the app provides structured decision-support tools and checklists for patient assessment. This digital intervention aims to enhance primary healthcare delivery, ensuring timely referrals and informed clinical decision-making nationwide.

title: Union Health Minister Marks World Health Day
summary: Union Minister Shri Jagat Prakash Nadda extended greetings on World Health Day, emphasizing the government's commitment to preventive and promotive healthcare. He highlighted the synergy between traditional wisdom and modern science, citing Ayushman Bharat and PM Bharatiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana as transformative initiatives. The Minister praised frontline healthcare workers for their dedication in making quality treatment accessible and affordable for citizens.
